hero.heading: Premium nail care, by appointment.
hero.subheading: Structured gel, builder gel extensions, and bespoke nail art — designed to last three full weeks. Rated 5.0 across 71 Google reviews.

about.heading: A nail studio built around the work, not the volume.
paragraphs: Stellusik runs one chair at a time — no walk-ins, no overbooking, no shortcuts on prep. That means longer-lasting gel, cleaner cuticles, and the time to bring a custom design to life from your reference photos.
Most of our clients come every three weeks. The work holds up that long because we use structured builder gel, e-file prep, and finishes that don't lift at the edges.

features.title: Gel that lasts 3 weeks
features.description: Structured builder gel, e-file prep, sealed edges. No early lifts, no surprise chips.

features.title: Custom art, hand-painted
features.description: Bring a reference photo or moodboard — chrome, ombré, French, line art, all done in-chair.

features.title: 5-star rated in Glendale
features.description: 71 verified Google reviews. Average rating: 5.0. Repeat clients book three appointments at a time.

services.title: Signature Gel Manicure
services.description: Structured gel overlay with a mirror-smooth finish in your choice of color.

services.title: Builder Gel Extensions
services.description: Soft-square, almond, or coffin — sculpted on your natural nail with builder gel. No acrylic.

services.title: Bespoke Nail Art
services.description: Hand-painted designs, chrome, ombré, French variations. Send a reference photo when you book.

services.title: Russian Pedicure
services.description: Dry, e-file based pedicure with a full cuticle reset. The longest-lasting pedi you'll book.

services.title: Soak-off & Reset
services.description: Gentle gel removal, nail strengthening treatment, and prep for your next look.

services.title: Lash Lift & Tint
services.description: Add-on service so you leave the chair styled head to fingertips. By appointment only.

reviews.name: Lara K.
reviews.text: I've gone every three weeks for almost two years. Best gel application in Glendale, period.

reviews.name: Maya H.
reviews.text: Booked builder gel and custom art for my wedding. She matched the moodboard perfectly.

reviews.name: Sara T.
reviews.text: Worth every dollar. Calm, clean studio, and the work holds up beautifully week to week.
